text.title: AI Code-Review Impact Suggestion Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Impact says 'changed 2 files'; production breaks because transitive consumer wasn't flagged.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects analyses without graph input.

antipattern.symptom: Reviewer assumes comment is from human; over-trusts.
Bot auto-merges PR after AI comment; bug ships.
